title: RC Lite (DEPRECATED)
description: RC Lite has been discontinuted. Please use Simply Legacy instead.
body:
## Please use [Simply Legacy](https://modrinth.com/modpack/simply-legacy), RC Lite has been discontinued

Simply Legacy is a modpack designed to bring an up-to-date vision of Minecraft's Legacy Console Edition. Because of the nature of its feature set, it is naturally much leaner than "RC+", so it effectively replaces the entire purpose of this modpack.
